mapper.select: SELECT * FROM AR_CALENDER WHERE CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId} AND DDATE_STR = #{ddateStr}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM AR_CALENDER WHERE CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId} AND DDATE_STR = #{ddateStr}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AR_CALENDER ( DDATE, IYEAR, IMONTH, IDAY, IWEEK, WORKDAYFLAG, DDATE_STR, CPNY_ID, SHIFT_NO, TYPEID, OVERTYPEID, TYPEID_DEFAULT, OPERATION_ID, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, ACTIVITY, ORDERNO, STATUTORY_FLAG, REMARK ) VALUES ( TO_DATE(#{ddateStr}, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), #{iyear}, #{imonth}, #{iday}, #{iweek}, #{workdayflag, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{ddateStr}, #{cpnyId}, #{shiftNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{typeid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{overtypeid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{typeidDefault, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{operationId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{activity, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{orderno, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{statutoryFlag, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM AR_CALENDER WHERE CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId} AND DDATE_STR = #{ddateStr}
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM AR_CALENDER_GROUP WHERE AR_DATE_STR = #{arDateStr} AND CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId} AND GROUP_ID = #{groupId}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM AR_CALENDER_GROUP WHERE AR_DATE_STR = #{arDateStr} AND CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId} AND GROUP_ID = #{groupId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AR_CALENDER_GROUP ( DDATE, IYEAR, IMONTH, IDAY, IWEEK, WORKDAYFLAG, TYPEID, OVERTYPEID, TYPEID_DEFAULT, GROUP_ID, SHIFT_NO, AR_DATE_STR, CPNY_ID, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, ACTIVITY, ORDERNO, OPERATION_ID ) VALUES ( TO_DATE(#{arDateStr}, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), #{iyear}, #{imonth}, #{iday}, #{iweek}, #{workdayflag, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{typeid, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{overtypeid, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{typeidDefault, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{groupId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shiftNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{arDateStr}, #{cpnyId}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{activity, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{orderno, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{operationId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM AR_CALENDER_GROUP_HISTORY WHERE AR_DATE_STR = #{arDateStr} AND CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AR_CALENDER_GROUP_HISTORY ( DDATE, IYEAR, IMONTH, IDAY, IWEEK, WORKDAYFLAG, TYPEID, OVERTYPEID, TYPEID_DEFAULT, GROUP_ID, SHIFT_NO, AR_DATE_STR, CPNY_ID, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, UPDATE_DATE, UPDATED_BY, ACTIVITY, ORDERNO, OPERATION_ID ) VALUES ( TO_DATE(#{arDateStr}, 'YYYY/MM/DD'), #{iyear}, #{imonth}, #{iday}, #{iweek}, #{workdayflag, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{typeid, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{overtypeid, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{typeidDefault, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{groupId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shiftNo, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{arDateStr}, #{cpnyId}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{activity, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{orderno, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{operationId, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.select:
SELECT a.*, c.CPNY_LOCATION AS COMPANY_NAME, TO_CHAR(a.DDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DDATE_FORMATTED, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(a.SHIFT_NO, #{lang}) AS SHIFT_NAME, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(a.TYPEID, #{lang}) AS TYPEID_NAME, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(a.OVERTYPEID, #{lang}) AS OVERTYPEID_NAME, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(a.TYPEID_DEFAULT, #{lang}) AS TYPEID_DEFAULT_NAME, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(a.GROUP_ID, #{lang}) AS GROUP_NAME FROM AR_CALENDER_GROUP a LEFT JOIN HR_COMPANY c ON a.CPNY_ID = c.CPNY_ID WHERE a.AR_DATE_STR = #{arDateStr} AND a.GROUP_ID = #{groupId}
AND a.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId}

SELECT a.DDATE, a.IYEAR, a.IMONTH, a.IDAY, a.IWEEK, a.WORKDAYFLAG, a.DDATE_STR, a.CPNY_ID, GET_AR_SHIFTNO(#{personId}, a.DDATE_STR, a.CPNY_ID) AS SHIFT_NO, GET_AR_DATETYPE_DETAIL(#{personId}, a.DDATE_STR, a.CPNY_ID) AS TYPEID, a.OVERTYPEID, a.TYPEID_DEFAULT, a.STATUTORY_FLAG, a.REMARK, TO_CHAR(a.DDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DDATE_FORMATTED, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(GET_AR_SHIFTNO(#{personId}, a.DDATE_STR, a.CPNY_ID), #{lang}) AS SHIFT_NAME, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(GET_AR_DATETYPE_DETAIL(#{personId}, a.DDATE_STR, a.CPNY_ID), #{lang}) AS TYPEID_NAME, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(a.OVERTYPEID, #{lang}) AS OVERTYPEID_NAME, GET_GLOBAL_NAME(a.TYPEID_DEFAULT, #{lang}) AS TYPEID_DEFAULT_NAME FROM AR_CALENDER a WHERE a.DDATE BETWEEN GET_AR_START_DATE(#{iyear} || #{imonth}, a.CPNY_ID, '') AND GET_AR_END_DATE(#{iyear} || #{imonth}, a.CPNY_ID, '') AND a.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId} ORDER BY a.DDATE

SELECT c.DDATE_STR, c.IYEAR, c.IMONTH, c.IDAY, c.IWEEK, c.WORKDAYFLAG, c.CPNY_ID, c.OVERTYPEID, c.TYPEID_DEFAULT, c.STATUTORY_FLAG, TO_CHAR(c.DDATE, 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS DDATE_FORMATTED, GET_AR_SHIFTNO(#{personId}, c.DDATE_STR, c.CPNY_ID) as SHIFT_NO, GET_AR_DATETYPE_DETAIL(#{personId}, c.DDATE_STR, c.CPNY_ID) as TYPEID, s.REMARK FROM AR_CALENDER c LEFT JOIN AR_SCHEDULE_HTSV s ON s.PERSON_ID = #{personId} AND s.AR_DATE_STR = #{arDateStr} WHERE c.DDATE_STR = #{arDateStr} AND c.CPNY_ID = #{cpnyId} AND ROWNUM = 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO AR_SCHEDULE_HTSV ( PK_NO, PERSON_ID, SHIFT_NO, AR_DATE_STR, LOCK_YN, CREATE_DATE, CREATED_BY, CREATED_IP, ACTIVITY, ORDERNO, ADD_FLAG, TYPEID, REMARK ) VALUES ( AR_SCHEDULE_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{personId}, #{shiftNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{arDateStr}, 'N', SYSDATE, #{adminID, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{adminIP, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{activity, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{orderno, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{addFlag, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{typeid, jdbcType=NUMERIC}, #{remark, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
